name: obsidian-headless-docs
description: Documentation for the Headless Go client for Obsidian — CLI client for Obsidian Sync and Publish

scripts.docs:preview: docker compose -f docker-compose.docs.yml up --build -d && node -e "setTimeout(() => {}, 2000)" && echo 'Docs served at http://localhost:8080/obsidian-headless/'
